vocabulary.english: To know / To be acquainted with
vocabulary.translation: We have already known each other for five years.
He just graduated and is still looking for a job.
She just got married; they have a great relationship.

vocabulary.english: To break up / To part ways
vocabulary.example: 他们已经分手了，但还是保持联系。
vocabulary.translation: They have already broken up, but still keep in touch.

vocabulary.example: 我已经工作了，去年毕业的。
vocabulary.translation: I'm already working — I graduated last year.
He just arrived and hasn't eaten yet.

vocabulary.example: 大学期间，他们有很多共同爱好。
vocabulary.translation: During university, they had many shared hobbies.

vocabulary.example: 大学期间的经历真难忘。
vocabulary.translation: The experiences during university are truly unforgettable.

vocabulary.english: To contact / To keep in touch
vocabulary.example: 不早点联系，感情就会变差。
vocabulary.translation: If you don't keep in touch early on, the relationship will deteriorate.

vocabulary.example: 不早点联系，关系就很难发展了。
vocabulary.translation: If you don't keep in touch early on, the relationship will be hard to develop.

vocabulary.example: 大学期间，他们有很多共同爱好。
vocabulary.translation: During university, they had many shared hobbies.

vocabulary.example: 他们感情很好，结婚以后一直保持联系。
vocabulary.translation: They have a great relationship and have kept in touch ever since getting married.

vocabulary.english: Have known each other for five years

key_sentences.pinyin: Wǒ men yǐ jīng rèn shi wǔ nián le.
key_sentences.english: We have already known each other for five years.

key_sentences.pinyin: Tā gāng bì yè, hái zài zhǎo gōng zuò.
key_sentences.english: He just graduated and is still looking for a job.

key_sentences.chinese: 他们感情很好，结婚以后一直保持联系。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā men gǎn qíng hěn hǎo, jié hūn yǐ hòu yì zhí bǎo chí lián xì.
key_sentences.english: They have a great relationship and have kept in touch ever since getting married.

key_sentences.chinese: 大学期间，他们有很多共同爱好。
key_sentences.pinyin: Dà xué qī jiān, tā men yǒu hěn duō gòng tóng ài hào.
key_sentences.english: During university, they had many shared hobbies.

key_sentences.chinese: 不早点联系，关系就很难发展了。
key_sentences.pinyin: Bù zǎo diǎn lián xì, guān xi jiù hěn nán fā zhǎn le.
key_sentences.english: If you don't keep in touch early on, the relationship will be hard to develop.

key_sentences.chinese: 他们已经分手了，但还是保持联系。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā men yǐ jīng fēn shǒu le, dàn hái shi bǎo chí lián xì.
key_sentences.english: They have already broken up, but still keep in touch.

grammar_points.title: 时段补语 — Duration Expressions
grammar_points.explanation: To express how long an action has lasted, use: V + 了 + Time Duration (+ 了). The first 了 marks completion of a single instance; the second 了 at the sentence end indicates the situation is ongoing up to now. Example: 我们认识了五年了 = We've known each other for five years (and still do). Without the second 了, it implies the duration is completed.

examples.pinyin: Wǒ men rèn shi le wǔ nián le.
examples.english: We've known each other for five years.

examples.pinyin: Tā děng le liǎng gè xiǎo shí.

exercises.question: Which sentence means 'She has studied Chinese for three years (and still is)'?
option_pinyin: Tā xué Hàn yǔ xué le sān nián le.
Tā xué Hàn yǔ xué le sān nián.
Tā yǐ jīng xué sān nián Hàn yǔ.
Tā xué Hàn yǔ gāng sān nián.

exercises.question: Fill in: 他们结婚___十年___。(They've been married for ten years — and still are.)
What does the second 了 at sentence end signal in a duration expression?
options: The action is completed and finished
The action happened in the past only

exercises.question: How do you say 'She waited for half an hour'?
option_pinyin: Tā děng le bàn gè xiǎo shí.
Tā děng bàn gè xiǎo shí le.
Tā yǐ jīng děng bàn gè xiǎo shí.
Tā gāng děng bàn gè xiǎo shí le.

exercises.question: Translate: 我们认识了五年了。
exercises.correct: We've known each other for five years.
options: We've known each other for five years.
We knew each other five years ago.
We will know each other for five years.
We just met five years ago.

grammar_points.title: 刚 vs 已经 — Just vs. Already
grammar_points.explanation: 刚 (gāng) = just recently — emphasises that an action happened a very short time ago. 已经 (yǐ jīng) = already — emphasises that an action is completed, possibly some time ago. 刚 focuses on recency; 已经 focuses on completion. 刚 is often followed by 了 or used alone. 已经 is often followed by 了 to confirm completion.

examples.pinyin: Tā gāng lái, hái méi chī fàn.
examples.english: He just arrived and hasn't eaten yet.

examples.pinyin: Tā yǐ jīng zǒu le, nǐ lái wǎn le.
examples.english: He has already left — you came too late.

exercises.question: Which adverb emphasises very recent completion?
Fill in: 我___毕业，刚开始找工作。(I just graduated and just started looking for work.)
Which sentence means 'They have already broken up'?
option_pinyin: Tā men yǐ jīng fēn shǒu le.
Tā men yào fēn shǒu le.
Tā men méi yǒu fēn shǒu.

exercises.question: What is the difference between 刚 and 已经?
exercises.correct: 刚 = just now (recent); 已经 = already (completed)
options: 刚 = just now (recent); 已经 = already (completed)
刚 = already done; 已经 = just started
刚 = not yet; 已经 = never

exercises.question: Translate: 她刚结婚，感情很好。
exercises.correct: She just got married; they have a great relationship.
options: She just got married; they have a great relationship.
She already got married a long time ago.
She is about to get married.
She wants to get married soon.

grammar_points.title: 不...就... / 不...才... — Not...then... / Not...until...
grammar_points.explanation: 不...就... = if not X, then Y (expresses a consequence). 不...才... = not until X (emphasises delay or condition before a result). 不早点睡就会累 = If you don't sleep early, you'll be tired. 不努力才会失败 = Only by not working hard will one fail. 才 implies the result is delayed or conditional.

examples.chinese: 不早点联系，感情就会变差。
examples.pinyin: Bù zǎo diǎn lián xì, gǎn qíng jiù huì biàn chà.
examples.english: If you don't keep in touch early on, the relationship will deteriorate.

examples.chinese: 不努力发展，才会失去机会。
examples.pinyin: Bù nǔ lì fā zhǎn, cái huì shī qù jī huì.
examples.english: Only by not working hard will you lose the opportunity.

exercises.question: Fill in: 不好好复习，___会不及格。
What does 不...就... express?
exercises.correct: A consequence if something is not done
options: A consequence if something is not done
An action that is already completed

exercises.question: Which sentence means 'If you don't call, she won't come'?
option_pinyin: Nǐ bù dǎ diàn huà, tā jiù bù lái.
Nǐ gāng dǎ diàn huà, tā jiù lái le.
Nǐ yǐ jīng dǎ diàn huà, tā lái le.
Nǐ cái dǎ diàn huà, tā jiù zǒu le.

exercises.question: What does 才 in 不...才... emphasise?
exercises.correct: Delay — the result only happens under a negative condition
options: Delay — the result only happens under a negative condition

exercises.question: Translate: 不保持联系，感情就会变淡。
exercises.correct: If you don't keep in touch, feelings will fade.
options: If you don't keep in touch, feelings will fade.
Just keep in touch and feelings will grow.
Already out of touch, feelings have faded.
Since you kept in touch, feelings are strong.

quiz.question: What does 认识 mean?
quiz.correct: To know / To be acquainted with
options: To meet for the first time
To know / To be acquainted with

quiz.question: What does 毕业 mean?
What does 已经 mean?
What does 刚 mean?
What does 感情 mean?
How do you say 'to break up'?
What does 期间 mean?
Which word means 'hobby / interest'?
What does 联系 mean?
Which sentence correctly says 'We've known each other for five years'?
What does 刚毕业 mean?
What does 保持联系 mean?
What does 感情很好 mean?
Fill in: 不早点___，感情就会变差。
Which adverb emphasises completion that happened some time ago?
What does 共同爱好 mean?
What does 分手了 mean?
What does 已经发展了 mean?
How do you express ongoing duration in Chinese?
What does 结婚以后 mean?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 加缪！好久不见！我们已经认识五年了吧？
lines.pinyin: Jiā Móu! Hǎo jiǔ bú jiàn! Wǒ men yǐ jīng rèn shi wǔ nián le ba?
lines.english: Camus! Long time no see! We've already known each other for five years, right?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 对！时间过得真快。你刚毕业还是已经工作了？
lines.pinyin: Duì! Shí jiān guò de zhēn kuài. Nǐ gāng bì yè hái shi yǐ jīng gōng zuò le?
lines.english: Yes! Time flies. Did you just graduate or are you already working?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我已经工作了，去年毕业的。你呢？
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yǐ jīng gōng zuò le, qù nián bì yè de. Nǐ ne?
lines.english: I'm already working — I graduated last year. What about you?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我刚找到工作，上个月才开始。我们有共同爱好，应该多保持联系。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ gāng zhǎo dào gōng zuò, shàng gè yuè cái kāi shǐ. Wǒ men yǒu gòng tóng ài hào, yīng gāi duō bǎo chí lián xì.
lines.english: I just found a job — I only started last month. We share common interests; we should keep in touch more.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 对！不保持联系，感情就会变淡了。
lines.pinyin: Duì! Bù bǎo chí lián xì, gǎn qíng jiù huì biàn dàn le.
lines.english: Exactly! If we don't keep in touch, our friendship will fade.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 大学期间的经历真难忘，我们感情一直很好。
lines.pinyin: Dà xué qī jiān de jīng lì zhēn nán wàng, wǒ men gǎn qíng yì zhí hěn hǎo.
lines.english: The experiences during university are truly unforgettable — our friendship has always been great.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 听说你们分手了？发生什么事了？
lines.pinyin: Tīng shuō nǐ men fēn shǒu le? Fā shēng shén me shì le?
lines.english: I heard you two broke up. What happened?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我们已经分手了，但还是保持联系。感情还是不错的。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ men yǐ jīng fēn shǒu le, dàn hái shi bǎo chí lián xì. Gǎn qíng hái shi bú cuò de.
lines.english: We've already broken up, but we still keep in touch. The relationship is still good.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ men rèn shi duō jiǔ le?
lines.english: How long have you known each other?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 认识了三年了，有很多共同爱好和经历。
lines.pinyin: Rèn shi le sān nián le, yǒu hěn duō gòng tóng ài hào hé jīng lì.
lines.english: We've known each other for three years and have many shared hobbies and experiences.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 那很好。刚分手的时候肯定不容易。
lines.pinyin: Nà hěn hǎo. Gāng fēn shǒu de shí hou kěn dìng bù róng yì.
lines.english: That's nice. It was definitely hard when you first broke up.
